title: Additional Placements
description: Additional placement states for many blocks, including vertical slabs and stairs
body:
[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/discord/176190900945289237?style=flat-square&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&label=Discord)](https://discord.gg/ykHRhmC)

![Mod Logo](https://github.com/FirEmerald/AdditionalPlacements/blob/1.20.1/logo.png?raw=true)

[Fabric version here](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-placements-fabric)



Additional Placements is a Vanilla-lite mod that allows you to place blocks in new orientations.
No new items are added - instead, the placement logic of the original blocks is modified.
Currently supports (includes most mod-added as well):
Slabs - allows vertical placement
Stairs - allows vertical placement, and stairs will connect vertically as well
Carpets - allows placement on walls and ceilings
Pressure Plates - allows placement on walls and ceilings

![A group of vaguely spherical objects](https://i.imgur.com/8lUz6pT.png)
The "testing spheres". These odd shapes contain all 108 different possible stair block states and all 6 different possible slab block states, for testing purposes.

![Video of stairs and slabs being placed in various orientations](https://i.imgur.com/OnxYZfA.gif)
The placement logic for slabs and stairs.
